title: Karen, Nairobi — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Karen, Nairobi: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Karen is a city in Nairobi with a population of 80,000. An affluent suburb of Nairobi, known for the Karen Blixen Museum, luxury homes, and the Nairobi National Park.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
